summary:
GLOBAL ECONOMIC AND OIL CRISIS PREDICTIONS: Brandon recounts a divine revelation he received around April 2022 regarding a severe upcoming economic crisis. He explains that oil prices are destined to surge to two hundred dollars a barrel, with gas prices reaching nearly seven dollars a gallon. Brandon attributes this manufactured shortage to a secret alliance against the United States, orchestrated by the Prince of Saudi Arabia in coordination with Russia and China. He connects these rising commodity prices and inflation control measures to a broader global economic reset involving new digital currencies and the intentional weakening of the American dollar.

VOLCANIC ERUPTION THREAT IN ITALY: Brandon describes a subsequent open-eye vision he experienced recently, instructing him to urgently pray for Italy. He witnessed a massive, catastrophic volcanic eruption originating in the water along the Italian coastline, directly adjacent to a large coastal city or town. Brandon warns that this severe end-time event will cause major devastation but will be preceded by observable warning signs such as earthquakes, tremors, and smoke. He strongly urges the people of Italy, regardless of their faith, to remain vigilant of local news and to evacuate the area immediately once these preliminary rumblings begin.
rawData: [July 05, 2023]-[The Lord showed me a massive volcano erupt in Italy - major devastation]-[https://youtu.be/P7viEh9luCE]-[Hey, good morning everybody again. I'm going to do another video here; I'm doing them back to back. This is something the Lord brought to my attention yesterday in my prayer time. He told me that in the summer of 2022—I believe it was about this time last year, well, a little bit before because it was probably around April or so—he came to me when I was praying and said, 'Brandon, there's going to be a massive increase in the near future coming up. Oil is going to go to $200 a barrel.' He said the Prince of Saudi Arabia is going to go against the United States, and they're going to cause an oil shortage. They're going to go with Russia and China in this, and it's like a secret mission against the United States. But I saw the price of gas go to almost seven dollars a gallon again. I saw things like the price of commodities rising because they're trying to control inflation. This is all part of the global economic reset; it's part of the digital platform they're doing—creating new digital currencies and weakening the dollar. I don't know how all this happens; I'm just saying these are the parts that I see. The Lord told me that, like I said, oil would go to $200 a barrel and gas was going to go very, very high, so I just wanted to warn you about some of this stuff. Number two: this was three or four weeks ago, I believe. I was praying and the Lord showed me, 'I need you to pray for Italy.' I said, 'What's going on with Italy, Lord?' and he showed me—I had an open-eye vision again—that there's a massive volcano that's about to happen. I saw a coastline on the water, and there's a massive volcano there. He told me this is going to happen, and he said there will be signs right before there's a massive explosion. I saw it explode huge, and he kept having me pray over the ocean. There's something about the water around Italy that is very dangerous; there's like a volcano in that water, and this is going to shoot off and cause major devastation. It's going to be very serious. I've been praying for the people of Italy to wake up. If they are Christian—or if they're not—pray that they are where they're supposed to be so that they will leave when this thing goes off. There's a huge town or city on the edge of the water where I saw this volcano go off. There will be signs, maybe even on the news in Italy, about some rumblings around that area—some earthquakes or tremors—to pre-warn that something big is going to happen. Do not ignore this. It is very serious; what I saw is very serious. If you have little tremors, if you start having a lot of tremors, and you start seeing smoke or there's something going on, take heed. Be forewarned; I'm trying to tell you this is going to be a major event, an end-time event. I don't know when it's going to happen; I wish I did. I'm sorry; I only see in part and I hear in part, and so it's just stuff I'm praying over. That's basically what I had; those are two little things. I have another video I'm about to do; it'll be my third video, but this is the positive one. Have a blessed day. Bye-bye.]
